info.title: GrowWise API
info.description: AI-Powered Learning Platform with Dynamic Assessment and Personalised Learning Paths

post.description: Register a new user
Login with email and password, returns JWT token with session tracking
Alternative login endpoint that accepts JSON instead of form data
Refresh access token using refresh token

Logout user and invalidate session
If session_id is provided, logout that specific session
Otherwise, logout from all sessions

get.description: Get current authenticated user information with session details

delete.description: Delete current user account (soft delete - deactivate all sessions)

get.description: Get all sessions for current user

schema.title: Response Get My Sessions Api Auth Sessions Get

delete.description:
Revoke all sessions for current user
If except_current=True, keeps the current session active

get.description: Get details of a specific session

delete.description: Revoke a specific session (logout from that session)

post.description: Change password for current user

Request password reset - generates reset token
In production, this would send an email with reset link
Confirm password reset with token

get.description: Get all users (Admin only)

schema.title: Response Get All Users Api Auth Users Get

get.description: Get specific user by ID (Admin only)

post.description:
Create a new learning track (Admin only).

After the track is saved, dimensions are generated asynchronously in the
background via the AI dimension generator — the response is returned
immediately without waiting for AI generation to complete.

get.description: Get all available learning tracks

schema.title: Response Get All Tracks Api Tracks  Get

post.description:
Create a new assessment dimension for a specific track (Admin only).
Dimensions model different perspectives such as theory, problem solving,
practical skills, communication, etc.

get.description: Get all assessment dimensions configured for a track.

schema.title: Response Get Track Dimensions Api Tracks  Track Id  Dimensions Get

put.description: Update an existing assessment dimension for a track (Admin only).

delete.description: Delete an assessment dimension from a track (Admin only).

post.description: User selects a learning track

get.description: Get current user's track selections

schema.title: Response Get My Track Selections Api Tracks My Selections Get

get.description: Get user's most recently selected track
Get a specific track by ID

post.description: Add a question to the assessment pool (Admin only)

get.description: Get assessment questions for a specific track

schema.title: Response Get Questions By Track Api Assessment Questions Track  Track Id  Get

post.description: Start a new assessment session for a user

get.description: Get details of an assessment session
Get all questions for an assessment session

schema.title: Response Get Session Questions Api Assessment Sessions  Session Id  Questions Get

post.description: Submit an answer for a question in the assessment
Complete the assessment and generate results with AI analysis

get.description: Get the result of a completed assessment
Retrieve the AI-generated learning path (stages only) for a completed session.
Get all assessment sessions for the current user

schema.title: Response Get My Assessment Sessions Api Assessment My Sessions Get

post.description:
Generate AI-powered personalized learning path based on assessment results
If auto_generate_content=True, automatically generates learning materials for each stage

get.description: Get a specific learning path with all stages
Get all learning paths for current user

schema.title: Response Get My Learning Paths Api Learning My Paths Get

get.description: Get user's most recent learning path
Get details of a specific learning stage
Get all stages for a learning path in order

schema.title: Response Get Path Stages Api Learning Paths  Path Id  Stages Get

get.description: Get current user's skill profile

post.description:
Generate AI-powered learning content for a stage
This endpoint automatically creates videos, docs, exercises, etc.

get.description: Get all learning content for a stage with user's progress

schema.title: Response Get Stage Content Api Content Stage  Stage Id  Get

post.description: Start tracking progress for a content item

put.description: Update progress for a content item

post.description: Mark a content item as completed

get.description: Get user's progress summary for a stage
Get all content progress for current user

schema.title: Response Get My Content Progress Api Content My Progress Get

get.description: Get a specific content item

post.description: Add content to knowledge base with embeddings (Admin only)

get.description: Get all knowledge base entries for a track

schema.title: Response Get Knowledge By Track Api Chat Knowledge Track  Track Id  Get

post.description: Start a new chat session for a learning stage

get.description: Get details of a chat session

delete.description: Delete a chat session and all its messages

get.description: Get all chat sessions for current user, optionally filtered by stage

schema.title: Response Get My Chat Sessions Api Chat My Sessions Get

post.description: Send a message in a chat session and get AI mentor response

get.description: Get all messages in a chat session

schema.title: Response Get Chat Messages Api Chat Sessions  Chat Id  Messages Get

post.description:
Start a new AI interview evaluation session with full user context
AI interviewer has access to:
- All assessment scores and feedback
- Learning path progress
- Content completion status
- Previous evaluation attempts

get.description: Get details of an evaluation session
Get all evaluation sessions for current user

schema.title: Response Get My Evaluation Sessions Api Evaluation My Sessions Get

post.description: Submit a response in the evaluation conversation

get.description: Get all dialogues in an evaluation session

schema.title: Response Get Evaluation Dialogues Api Evaluation Sessions  Evaluation Id  Dialogues Get

post.description: Complete the evaluation and generate AI-powered results

get.description: Get the result of a completed evaluation

Get complete assessment history with scores over time
Shows improvement progression across multiple attempts
Compare two assessment attempts to see improvement
Get detailed progress for a learning path
Get all evaluation attempts with scores over time
Complete dashboard with all progress metrics
Get timeline of learning activity

GenerateStageContentRequest.title: GenerateStageContentRequest
GenerateStageContentRequest.description: Request to generate AI-powered content for a stage

StageProgressSummary.title: StageProgressSummary
StageProgressSummary.description: Summary of user's progress for a stage

UserDetailedResponse.title: UserDetailedResponse
UserDetailedResponse.description: Extended user response with session count
